goal: Build an MMS code knowledge graph system (Graphify alternative) in /Users/xin/auto-skills/CtriXin-repo/folder-graphy

tasks.description: Create project structure and core configuration files (package.json, tsconfig.json, .gitignore)
acceptance_criteria: Project can be initialized with npm install
TypeScript compilation works
Basic folder structure exists (src/, dist/, scripts/)
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for low config task

tasks.description: Design and create SQLite database schema for storing symbols, files, relationships, and git state
acceptance_criteria: Schema includes tables: symbols, files, relationships, git_index_state
Supports symbol types: function, class, interface, method, variable
Supports relationship types: defines, imports, calls, implements, extends
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium schema task

tasks.description: Implement SCIP index parser to read scip-typescript/scip-go output and populate database
acceptance_criteria: Parses SCIP index protobuf format
Extracts symbol definitions with name, kind, location (file, line, column)
Extracts symbol relationships (references, implementations)
Maps SCIP symbol descriptors to internal symbol IDs
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium-high algorithms task

tasks.description: Create TypeScript indexer wrapper that runs scip-typescript and feeds output to parser
acceptance_criteria: Runs scip-typescript on target directory
Feeds SCIP output to parser
Handles errors gracefully with meaningful messages
Returns list of indexed files and symbol count
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium utils task

tasks.description: Create Go indexer wrapper that runs scip-go and feeds output to parser
acceptance_criteria: Runs scip-go on target directory
Feeds SCIP output to parser
Handles errors gracefully with meaningful messages
Returns list of indexed files and symbol count
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium utils task

tasks.description: Implement git diff tracker for incremental indexing of changed files only
acceptance_criteria: Detects changed files via git diff against last indexed commit
Identifies added, modified, deleted files
Stores last indexed commit hash in database
Provides list of files needing re-indexing
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium utils task

tasks.description: Build query API for answering 'where is this function defined' and 'who calls this function'
acceptance_criteria: findDefinition(symbolName) returns file path, line, column, symbol kind
findCallers(symbolName) returns list of calling locations with context
findReferences(symbolName) returns all references including imports
Supports fuzzy matching for symbol names
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium api task

tasks.description: Create CLI interface with commands: index, query, stats, and reset
acceptance_criteria: index [path] command indexes the directory
query <symbol> command searches for symbol definition/references
stats command shows index statistics (files, symbols, relationships)
reset command clears the database
Exit codes: 0 for success, 1 for error, 2 for not found
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium api task

tasks.description: Integrate with MindKeeper thread mechanism - auto-update index on project session entry
acceptance_criteria: Provides hook script for MindKeeper to call on session start
Auto-detects project root from git repository
Runs incremental index update for changed files
Logs indexing results to stderr for debugging
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium api task

tasks.description: Test end-to-end by indexing agent-im directory and verifying basic queries work
acceptance_criteria: Successfully indexes ../agent-im directory
Can answer 'where is X defined' for at least 5 known functions
Can answer 'who calls Y' for at least 3 known call relationships
Incremental update works after file modification
All tests pass with npm test
tasks.assignment_reason: Assigned by registry for medium tests task
